name: @docuforge/desktop
description: DocuForge desktop video editing and documentary production studio
author: DocuForge

scripts.dev: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && wait-on -t 120000 http-get://127.0.0.1:3847/health http-get://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.start: npm run build:electron && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron .
